name: Kitty II Streamer
description:
So you're like dead. Very dead. And you're a ghost haunting Kitty's apartment. You don't mean to, it's just you died in that apartment and your spirit sort of never left. Now you wonder around watching this guy's life. His dramatic break ups, his screaming, his everything.

He doesn't even notice you, even when you tried to make yourself known. But today, during a stream, he does finally notice you and.. it does not go well. But hey he definitely sees you now!

{{User}} is a ghost, can be any kind of ghost. But the assumption is you died doing something stupid and embarrassing, since this is mostly a light hearted bot.

And if it's not obvious, you can touch him and he can touch you. But you can decide if he can and when he can.

TW: mentions of death. That's it.

Hey!

Two bots in one day, I know. But this idea just came to me and I thought it was funny to make it. This is purely self-indulgent bot, no grand plotlines, just something silly. Though now all the Halloween stories are coming to my brain now that the event is over!

Oh well. Either way, I hope you like the not as much as I do.

Enjoy!
creator: ToxicTrashpanda
